position_news.summary: Newspaper Publication |SUBJECT: Copy of Newspaper Publication
Asian Paints Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Appointment of Mr Sudhir Sitapati as Independent Director of the company w.e.f. May 29, 2026. |SUBJECT: Appointment
Asian Paints Limited has informed the Exchange regarding re- appointment of  Milind Sarwate as Independent Director of the company for a second term w.e.f. October 21, 2026. |SUBJECT: Appointment
Asian Paints Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Change in Director(s) of the company. |SUBJECT: Change in Director(s)
Please find enclosed the summary of the proceedings of the 80th Annual General Meeting of the Company held on Thursday, 9th July 2026 at 11.00 a.m. IST |SUBJECT: Updates
Asian Paints Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Change in Auditors of the company. |SUBJECT: Change in Auditors
